message:
feat(search): add SearchBridge — asupersync↔Tokio runtime bridge for FrankenSearch

New 792-line module implementing the runtime bridge adapter (ft-dr6zv.1.2)
that enables calling FrankenSearch's asupersync-based TwoTierSearcher from
FrankenTerm's Tokio async context.

Uses tokio::task::spawn_blocking to run asupersync's event loop on a
blocking thread with channel-based result passing. Handles cancellation
propagation between Tokio CancellationToken and asupersync structured
cancellation.

Behind cfg(feature = "frankensearch") — compiles out when feature disabled.

Implements: ft-dr6zv.1.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
